cmd_random_quote.name: random_quote
cmd_random_quote.p1_description: If selected, quotes from only that user will be drawn

quotes.channel_cleared: _Quotes will be sent to the channel where the command was used_
quotes.channel_error:
No permissions for the channel, or the channel does not exist, %channel%.
Quote drawn:
quotes.empty_database_user: No quotes for this user in the database.

cmd_stats.name: stat
cmd_stats.p1_description: Whose quotes you want to see

cmd_settings_help.name: help
cmd_settings_help.description: Description of guild bot configuration settings

cmd_set_channel.name: set_channel
cmd_set_channel.description: Change the text channel to which images with quotations are sent
cmd_set_channel.p1_description: If empty, graphics with quotes will be sent to the channel where the command was used

cmd_set_lang.name: set_language
cmd_set_lang.description: Change the language the bot uses on your guild

cmd_dummy_image.name: dummy_image
cmd_dummy_image.description: An example of how the citation graphics will be generated on this server
cmd_dummy_image.p1_description: Text that will be used when generating test graphics quotes

dummy_image.message: This is how the quotes generated on this guild will look like:

cmd_set_color.name: set_color
cmd_set_color.description: Change the accent color used by the bot when generating quotes graphics on your guild

set_color.hex_error: The color code specified is incorrect

cmd_set_background.name: set_background
cmd_set_background.description: Change the background used by the bot when generating quotes graphics on your guild
cmd_set_background.p2_description: Direct link to the image, (ending with .png). Recommended use imgur.com, recommended resolution 1280×720[px]

set_background.error: The URL given is incorrect, it should start with https://, and end with .png, .jpeg or .jpg extension.
set_background.changed: Background for your guild changed, change mode and use the test command to generate images with quotes to verify the changes.
set_background.clear: Background data for your guild removed, the default background will be used during generation

cmd_set_bg_mode.name: background_mode
cmd_set_bg_mode.description: Set the background for the quote images generated on your guild.
cmd_set_bg_mode.c1_name0: 'Avatar' - Background based on the avatar of the user to whom the quote belongs
cmd_set_bg_mode.c1_name2: 'URL' - If a command to add a background has been used, it will be used, otherwise, 'Avatar'

cmd_set_background_postprocess.name: set_postprocess
cmd_set_background_postprocess.description: Decide if the bot should process your URL background used in generating quotes.

set_background_postprocess.message0: Your URL image in the background of the generated quotes graphics on this guild  will not be processed
set_background_postprocess.message1: Your URL image in the background of the generated quotes graphics on this guild will be processed

cmd_stats_top.name: stats_top
cmd_stats_top.description: View top 10 quotes users or creators

cmd_set_daily_quote.name: set_daily_quote
cmd_set_daily_quote.description: A random quote will be sent to the specified channel
cmd_set_daily_quote.p1_description: The channel where the random quote will be sent
cmd_set_daily_quote.p2_description: UTC - The hour at which the quote will be sent
cmd_set_daily_quote.p3_description: The minute at which the quote will be sent
cmd_set_daily_quote.p5_description: Every day or a specific day?
cmd_set_daily_quote.p6_description: If selected, this role will be mentioned

errors.no_dm: This command cannot be used in private messages.
errors.no_guild: This command only works on a guilds.
errors.no_perm: You lack the required permissions to run this command.
errors.bot_no_perm: I don't have the required permissions to run this command.
errors.missing_role: You need the %role% role to use this command.
errors.bot_missing_role: I need the %role% role to use this command.
errors.user_input: Invalid input. Please check the command usage.
errors.bad_argument: One of the arguments is incorrect.
errors.bad_union_argument: Could not match any valid input type.
errors.cooldown: This command is on cooldown. Try again in %cooldown% seconds.
errors.dm_only: This command can only be used in private messages.
errors.check_failure: You do not meet the conditions to use this command.
errors.invoke_error: An error occurred while executing the command.
errors.forbidden: I don't have permission to perform this action.
errors.http: An unexpected error occurred while communicating with Discord.
errors.not_found: The requested resource was not found. It may have been deleted.
errors.invalid_argument: An invalid argument was passed to the command.
errors.login_failure: Failed to log in. Check your bot token.
errors.connection_closed: Connection to Discord was unexpectedly closed.
